allow: Bash(for f in test/unit/*.test.js test/unit/**/*.test.js test/integration/*.test.js)
Bash(for f in test/unit/guards/*.test.js test/unit/security/*.test.js test/unit/*.test.js test/red-team/*.test.js test/benchmarks/*.test.js)

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent add src/security/guards/prompt-guard.js src/security/index.js src/security/interceptor.js src/security/heartbeat-hooks.js test/unit/security/interceptor.test.js test/unit/guards/prompt-guard-ml.test.js test/red-team/adversarial-probes.test.js test/benchmarks/guard-performance.test.js)

Bash(for f in src/lib/knowledge/learning-log.js src/lib/knowledge/knowledge-board.js src/lib/knowledge/context-loader.js src/lib/knowledge/index.js src/lib/integrations/heartbeat-manager.js src/bot.js test/unit/knowledge/learning-log.test.js test/unit/knowledge/knowledge-board.test.js test/unit/knowledge/context-loader.test.js)

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add agent memory: LearningLog, KnowledgeBoard, ContextLoader \(Session 6\)

Append-only learning log via WebDAV with batched writes and flush guard,
Deck-based knowledge board with 4-stack verification workflow \(Verified/
Uncertain/Stale/Disputed\), context loader for injecting recent learnings
into agent prompts, heartbeat integration for board checks and shutdown
flush, and 70 unit tests covering all modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Session 10: Fix Skill Forge 404, Deck test mocks, output verifier backtick detection

NCRequestManager now resolves 404 responses instead of rejecting, unblocking
TemplateLoader/SkillActivator callers that check response.status === 404.
Fix Deck test mocks to target /boards/{id}/stacks endpoint matching getAllCards\(\).
Add recon commands \(whoami, id, uname, etc.\) to backtick injection detection.

Test results: 43/44 files pass \(up from 41/44\). Pre-existing webhook
integration test is the sole remaining failure \(requires running server\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Session 14b: Wire AgentLoop into webhook-server.js startup

Instantiate OllamaToolsProvider, ToolRegistry \(8 tools\), and AgentLoop
at startup and inject into MessageProcessor. Update providers.json with
correct Ollama VM endpoint and llama3.1 model. Natural language messages
now route through the tool-calling LLM agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Session 14c: Switch AgentLoop to ClaudeToolsProvider, fix SOUL.md tool names

Swap LLM provider from Ollama to Claude for reliable tool calling. Claude
completes deck_move_card in 7s/2 iterations vs Ollama''s 80s+ with text-only
output. SOUL.md updated to reference actual tool names \(deck_move_card,
calendar_create_event\) instead of client methods \(DeckClient.moveCard\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Session 16b: Add deck_share_board tool, HITL gate, and 403 error handling

Completes remaining DeckOps briefing items: deck_share_board with ownership
check, HITL approval for board sharing, and friendly 403 permission errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Session 26: SearXNG deployment — Docker container, env var, persistent settings

Install Docker, deploy SearXNG container with JSON format enabled,
add SEARXNG_URL to systemd service and .env.example, and persist
the SearXNG settings.yml for bind-mount on container recreation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Sync deploy/moltagent.service with live unit

Match the running systemd config: webhook-server.js entrypoint, drop
User/Group \(runs as root\), remove MemoryDenyWriteExecute \(breaks V8 JIT\),
and remove StartLimitIntervalSec \(invalid in [Service] section\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/moltagent commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Session 30: HeartbeatManager in webhook-server, DeckClient fix, INITIATIVE_LEVEL=2

Wire HeartbeatManager into webhook-server.js so proactive operations
\(Cockpit board, daily digest, calendar checks, Deck inbox processing,
freshness checks\) run in the production process. Fix HeartbeatManager
DeckClient to use NCRequestManager instead of legacy mode, resolving
"DeckClient requires NCRequestManager" errors on every heartbeat pulse.
Set INITIATIVE_LEVEL=2 in systemd service for proactive operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
